testcase.name: Story 1.1: Admin User Management › [P0-E2E-012] should allow admin to create new user with default capability

failure.message: story-1.1-admin-user-management.spec.ts:55:7 [P0-E2E-012] should allow admin to create new user with default capability

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › story-1.1-admin-user-management.spec.ts:55:7 › Story 1.1: Admin User Management › [P0-E2E-012] should allow admin to create new user with default capability
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByTestId('capability-checkboxes') Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for getByTestId('capability-checkboxes')
91 | 92 | // And: see capability checkboxes (15 from database + 1 from component) > 93 | await expect(page.getByTestId('capability-checkboxes')).toBeVisible(); | ^ 94 | const checkboxes = page.locator('[data-testid^="capability-"]'); 95 | await expect(checkboxes).toHaveCount(16); // 15 capabilities from DB 96 | at C:\Users\ambso\dev\gmao-hiansa\tests\e2e\story-1.1-admin-user-management.spec.ts:93:61

testcase.name: Story 1.1: Admin User Management › [P0-E2E-013] should allow admin to assign multiple capabilities to user
Story 1.1: Admin User Management › [P0-E2E-014] should perform soft delete and prevent login
Story 1.1: Admin User Management › [P0-E2E-015] should show users list with admin capabilities
Story 1.1: Forced Password Reset Flow › [P0-E2E-005] should redirect to /change-password when forcePasswordReset is true
testcase.system-out: ✅ Database is available and healthy ✅ Test user tecnico@hiansa.com verified ✅ Test user new.user@example.com verified After login, current URL: http://localhost:3000/cambiar-password

testcase.name: Story 1.1: Forced Password Reset Flow › [P0-E2E-006] should block navigation to other routes until password is changed
Story 1.1: Forced Password Reset Flow › [P0-E2E-007] should allow password change and redirect to dashboard
testcase.system-out: Browser console: %cDownload the React DevTools for a better development experience: https://reactjs.org/link/react-devtools font-weight:bold Browser console: [LoginForm] Attempting login with email: new.user@example.com Browser console: [LoginForm] Login result: {error: null, status: 200, ok: true, url: http://localhost:3000/login} Browser console: [LoginForm] result.ok: true result.error: null result.url: http://localhost:3000/login Browser console: [LoginForm] Session after login: {user: Object, expires: 2026-03-14T19:23:08.489Z} Browser console: [LoginForm] forcePasswordReset value: true Browser console: [LoginForm] forcePasswordReset is true, redirecting to /cambiar-password Submit button enabled: [33mtrue[39m Change password API response status: [33m200[39m Change password API response body: {"success":true,"message":"Contraseña cambiada exitosamente"} Browser console: %cDownload the React DevTools for a better development experience: https://reactjs.org/link/react-devtools font-weight:bold Browser console: %cDownload the React DevTools for a better development experience: https://reactjs.org/link/react-devtools font-weight:bold Browser console: [LoginForm] Attempting login with email: new.user@example.com Browser console: [LoginForm] Login result: {error: null, status: 200, ok: true, url: http://localhost:3000/login} Browser console: [LoginForm] result.ok: true result.error: null result.url: http://localhost:3000/login Browser console: [LoginForm] Session after login: {user: Object, expires: 2026-03-14T19:23:14.006Z} Browser console: [LoginForm] forcePasswordReset value: false Browser console: %cDownload the React DevTools for a better development experience: https://reactjs.org/link/react-devtools font-weight:bold

testcase.name: Story 1.1: Forced Password Reset Flow › [P0-E2E-008] should validate password strength on change
Story 1.1: Login Authentication Flow › [P0-E2E-001] should display login form with required fields and testids
testcase.system-out: ✅ Database is available and healthy ✅ Test user tecnico@hiansa.com verified ✅ Test user new.user@example.com verified

testcase.name: Story 1.1: Login Authentication Flow › [P0-E2E-002] should login successfully with valid credentials and redirect to dashboard
Story 1.1: Login Authentication Flow › [P0-E2E-003] should show error message with invalid credentials
Story 1.1: User Profile Management › [P0-E2E-009] should display user profile with current information
Story 1.1: User Profile Management › [P0-E2E-010] should allow user to edit own profile
Story 1.1: User Profile Management › [P0-E2E-011] should allow user to change password from profile
